NAVAREA XIX 135/25
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 LAUNCH OPERATION WILL BE CONDUCTED. 0600-1630 AND 1800-0200 UTC DAILY FROM 13 TO 26 OCT 25.
 IN AREAS BOUNDED BY:
  
 A. 69-16N 012-42E
 B. 69-37N 012-42E
 C. 70-25N 013-17E
 D. 70-49N 016-39E
 E. 69-42N 016-53E
 F. 69-20N 015-09E
 G. 68-50N 014-14E
 H. 69-16N 012-42E
  
 NORWEGIAN NOTICES TO MARINERS 18/2025 REFERS
 FOR MORE INFORMATION CONTACT ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER. 
 TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 
 WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO
